taxonomy: × Calicharis butcheri is a species of sea slug, specifically a species of the genus Calicharis. It belongs to the phylum Mollusca and the class Gastropoda. The class Gastropoda is further divided into several suborders, and Calicharis butcheri is categorized under the suborder Nudibranchia. This suborder includes many species of sea slugs that are known for their colorful and unique appearances. Calicharis butcheri is a unique species within this suborder due to its distinct characteristics.
